_comment: Pin-of-record for codebase-memory-mcp (CMM). This is the ENTIRE upstream-tracking surface Celeborn owns (spec plan/cmm-celeborn.md §4.1). Runtime artifact = the signed release binary at the pinned `version`; `source` is the read-only mirror (CMM-7) kept for transparency + contract-testing, never built/patched. NEVER 'latest' at runtime — the pin advances only through the gated sync routine (`celeborn cmm sync-check`, CMM-9), which bumps it behind the interface contract test (CMM-8). Artifacts marked `"pending": true` carry placeholder checksums: provisioning REFUSES them (fail-safe) until the first real upstream sync fills in real sha256s. Filling these is the only edit this file should ever receive, and only via a sync PR.
